title: Trinity Trust Configuration (~/.trinity/trust.toml)
description: Per-operation and per-tier trust grants for Trinity Local. v1.0 schema; v1.1 may add fields. Maps the TOML file shape to JSON Schema for validation.

schema_version.description: Schema version. v1.0 ships schema_version=1; future migrations bump this.

trust.description: Top-level trust block. Mirrors [trust] in trust.toml.

default.description: Default decision for any operation not explicitly granted. 'ask' = prompt the user (skill tier delegates to Claude Code's permission prompt; pip tier emits a stderr y/N prompt; extension tier shows a popup). 'deny' = reject without prompting. 'trust' = proceed without prompting.

operations.description: Per-operation overrides. Keys match the `operation` field that audit_log records.

rules.description: Exact tier.operation overrides. Keys are '<tier>.<operation>' strings (e.g. 'extension.launch_council'). Wins against tier and operation defaults — most specific. Resolution: rules > operations > tiers > default.
